name: Antigravity UI
description: Elements float weightlessly with extreme soft-diffused shadows and levitation effects
implementation: box-shadow: 0 30px 60px -10px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transform: translateY(-2px); transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1);
use_cases: Premium B2C apps consulting landing pages luxury services
do_examples: Ample negative space to let elements float; subtle parallax on scroll
dont_examples: Cramping elements together destroying the depth illusion; heavy borders that ground elements

name: Premium Glassmorphism
description: Subtle high-end frosted glass with micro-borders and depth layering
implementation: backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(180%); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.03); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
use_cases: Media players OTT UI overlays tech dashboards music apps
do_examples: Placing over rich cinematic imagery or deep gradients; layering multiple glass panels at different opacities
dont_examples: Placing over flat white backgrounds where the effect is lost; using on text-heavy content reducing readability

name: Editorial Brutalism
description: Stark layouts heavy typography fine hairline borders and raw structural hierarchy
implementation: border: 0.5px solid #171717; typography scale: 1.250 (Major Third); mix-blend-mode: difference;
use_cases: Fashion e-commerce high-end portfolios editorial magazines
do_examples: Using massive typography for structural hierarchy; hanging punctuation and optical margins
dont_examples: Relying on color rather than typography for layout; using rounded corners which soften the brutalist edge

name: Bento Grid
description: Asymmetric multi-panel grid layout inspired by Japanese bento boxes with varied card sizes
implementation: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); grid-auto-rows: minmax(200px, auto); gap: 16px; .feature-card { grid-column: span 2; grid-row: span 2; }
use_cases: Feature showcases SaaS landing pages portfolio displays product highlights
do_examples: Varying card sizes to create visual hierarchy; using 2-4 column grids with intentional spans
dont_examples: Making all cards the same size defeating the purpose; using more than 6-8 cards per viewport

name: Aurora UI
description: Soft animated gradient backgrounds with organic color movement mimicking the Northern Lights
implementation: background: linear-gradient(135deg, #667eea 0%, #764ba2 100%); animation: aurora 8s ease-in-out infinite alternate; @keyframes aurora { 0% { background-position: 0% 50%; } 100% { background-position: 100% 50%; } }
use_cases: Hero sections premium backgrounds onboarding screens AI product pages
do_examples: Keeping gradients subtle and slow-moving; using complementary or analogous color pairs
dont_examples: Overly saturated or neon gradients that cause eye strain; fast jarring animation cycles

name: Neomorphism 2.0
description: Refined soft-extruded UI with inset and outset shadows creating tactile depth on light surfaces
use_cases: Settings panels media controls calculator UIs wellness apps
do_examples: Using on light muted backgrounds; keeping shadows subtle (8-16px); pairing with rounded shapes
dont_examples: Using on dark backgrounds where the effect breaks; applying to text or small elements

name: Mesh Gradient
description: Complex multi-point gradient backgrounds creating rich organic color fields
implementation: background: radial-gradient(at 40% 20%, #1a1a2e 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 80% 0%, #16213e 0px, transparent 50%), radial-gradient(at 0% 50%, #0f3460 0px, transparent 50%);
use_cases: Hero backgrounds premium cards app splash screens crypto platforms
do_examples: Using 3-4 gradient points with complementary colors; keeping at least one neutral anchor
dont_examples: Using too many gradient points creating muddy colors; applying over text without sufficient contrast

name: Dark Luxe
description: Ultra-premium dark mode with gold/warm accents subtle gradients and rich material depth
implementation: background: #0A0A0A; color: #FAFAFA; border: 1px solid rgba(212,175,55,0.15); box-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(212,175,55,0.03);
use_cases: Luxury e-commerce premium portfolios high-end dashboards abaya/fashion
do_examples: Using warm accent colors sparingly; deep blacks (#0A0A0A) not grey-blacks; subtle gold borders
dont_examples: Using pure white text at full opacity (use 0.87); making accent colors too prominent

name: Swiss Grid
description: Rigid mathematical grid system with systematic spacing and functional typography
implementation: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(12, 1fr); gap: 24px; font-family: 'Inter'; letter-spacing: -0.01em;
use_cases: Corporate dashboards enterprise apps government portals data-heavy interfaces
do_examples: Strict adherence to 8px baseline grid; consistent margins and gutters; clear hierarchy
dont_examples: Decorative elements that break the grid; inconsistent spacing values; too many font sizes

name: Liquid Design
description: Organic flowing shapes blob animations and fluid borders that feel alive
implementation: border-radius: 30% 70% 70% 30% / 30% 30% 70% 70%; animation: morph 8s ease-in-out infinite; @keyframes morph { 50% { border-radius: 70% 30% 30% 70% / 70% 70% 30% 30%; } }
use_cases: Creative agencies wellness brands cosmetics nature-inspired products
do_examples: Using organic shapes as background accents; keeping morphing slow and hypnotic
dont_examples: Using liquid shapes for content containers that need readability; too many animated shapes competing

name: Retro Futurism
description: CRT glow effects scan lines neon accents and cyberpunk aesthetics on dark backgrounds
implementation: text-shadow: 0 0 10px currentColor; background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.15) 0px, transparent 1px, transparent 2px); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono';
use_cases: Gaming platforms music apps dev tools creative portfolios crypto
do_examples: Using neon accents sparingly on dark backgrounds; CRT scanline effects at low opacity
dont_examples: Applying glow effects to body text; using on professional/corporate sites; overdoing the scanlines

name: Organic Minimalism
description: Warm natural palettes earth tones ample whitespace and intentional imperfection
implementation: background: #FAF9F6; color: #1C1917; border-radius: 0; font-family: serif; letter-spacing: 0.02em;
use_cases: Wellness brands artisan products sustainable fashion interior design photography
do_examples: Using off-white backgrounds; natural photography; generous line-height; asymmetric layouts
dont_examples: Using stark white or pure black; stock photography; symmetrical corporate layouts

name: Kinetic Typography
description: Text as the primary visual element with animated reveals weight transitions and scale shifts
implementation: font-size: clamp(3rem, 8vw, 8rem); font-weight: 900; animation: reveal 0.8s cubic-bezier(0.77, 0, 0.175, 1); clip-path: inset(0 100% 0 0); transition: clip-path 0.6s;
use_cases: Hero sections creative agencies editorial fashion event marketing
do_examples: Using variable fonts for weight animation; clip-path reveals; massive scale contrast
dont_examples: Animating too many text elements simultaneously; using on body copy or navigation
